backest: The deepest position on the target's side of the battlefield.
backward: The deeper the target is on their own side of the battlefield.
basicattr: A hero's basic stats include max HP, ATK, Phys DEF, and Magic DEF. If a hero's max HP is up or down in the battle, their current HP ratio remains the same.
blind: An abnormal status. Blinded units are unable to hit enemies with normal attacks.
campTalent_attr: After activating Faction Talent, all deployed heroes receive a stat boost regardless of their Factions.
campTalent_same: For Celestial and Hypogean, Faction Talent can be activated when a combined total of 3 heroes from either of these two factions are deployed.
campTalent_skill: After activating Faction Talent, the Talent Buff Tiles will also become available. The ally placed on those tiles will become the prime carrier and gain a new ability in battle, which varies depending on the activated Faction Talent.
carry: The hero placed on a Talent Buff Tile.
deckCost:
Activating Dual Resonance requires Energy.
Your choice of Rune and Valor Cards may increase or reduce the Energy cost.
deckRecover: Energy recovery per second provided by the Dual Resonance. Certain Rune Cards may also increase your Energy recovery.
disarm: An abnormal status. Disarmed units cannot use normal attacks.
dodg: The chance to dodge a normal attack. No damage is taken when dodging a normal attack.
dotDmg: Damage or HP loss caused by continuous debuffs such as Poison, Burn, or Bleed.
duelancientorc:
Wildborn Heroes.
The following heroes are considered Wildborn heroes in this Honor Duel session: Galahad, Nazrik, Kordan, and Tilaya.
duelcrit: In Honor Duel, heroes have a default 25% chance to land a critical strike when dealing damage, with a critical damage multiplier set at 150%. Heroes' Crit and critical damage multipliers can be modified by their skills and Equipment.
dueldarkelf:
Heroes of Sal'thorin.
The following heroes are considered Sal'thorin heroes in this Honor Duel session: Indris, Ravion, Velara, and Thador.
dueldesertorc:
Heroes of the Temple of Seers.
The following heroes are considered Temple of Seers heroes in this Honor Duel session: Satrana, Antandra, and Galahad.
dueldieseaundead:
Heroes of the Dead Tide Fleet.
The following heroes are considered Dead Tide Fleet heroes in this Honor Duel session: Hodgkin, Bonnie, Nara, and Viperian.
duelporthuman:
Lightbearer heroes from Rustport.
The following heroes are considered Lightbearer heroes from Rustport in this Honor Duel session: Sinbad, Lucca, and Sonja.
duelreshiram:
Heroes from the Lyceum.
The following heroes are considered Lyceum heroes in this Honor Duel session: Cassadee, Solise, Zorya, Pippa, Hepler, and Contess.
duelroyalhuman:
Heroes from the Lightbearer court.
The following heroes are considered Lightbearer court heroes in this Honor Duel session: Gwyneth, Cyran, Cassadee, and Evie.
duelswordman:
Blade-wielding heroes.
The following heroes are considered blade-wielding heroes in this Honor Duel session: Sonja, Brutus, Silven, Harak, and Baelran.
enchanted: One of the abnormal states. Charmed units attack their own allies.
fatal: Damage that can reduce all of a unit's remaining HP.
fear: One of the abnormal states. Frightened units are afraid to get close to the caster.
fever: Increases all non-summoned allies' damage dealt by 30%, damage reduction by 30%, and Haste by 30 until the end of a battle.
freeze: One of the abnormal states. Frozen units cannot move or act.
frontest: Closest to the enemy side of field
hpCut: This effect reduces a unit's maximum HP, with a cap of 25% of the unit's initial value. However, it does not apply in modes that track damage dealt, including modes like Dream Realm, Arcane Labyrinth, Battle Drills (battles against Elites and Bosses), Primal Lord, Guild Supremacy, Ravaged Realm, and Titan Reaver.
hpLoss: Refers to any effects that reduce a unit's current HP, including physical damage, magic damage, true damage, and other HP-reducing effects.
immobilize: One of the abnormal states. Immobilized units cannot move or use movement skills.
interrupteff: A collective term for various abnormal states that can interrupt a unit's current skills or attacks, such as Stun, Frozen, etc.
invincible: Immune to all type of damage and control effects and become untargetable.
lonely: A unit with no allies within a 1-tile radius.
meleeDmg: Damage dealt to enemies within 1 tile of the caster.
nukedmg: Damage exceeding 160% of their base ATK.
original: The amount of damage the attack or skill would have dealt. The amount is not affected by buffs and debuffs influencing damage of the attacking unit, nor those influencing Phys DEF, Magic DEF, shield or Stats of the unit being attacked.
power: A unit bearing a fragment of a Phantimal's power, gaining exclusive buffs.
rapiddmg: Deals damage at least 3 times within 2s.
remoteDmg: Damage dealt to enemies more than 1 tile away from the caster.
silence: An abnormal status. Silenced units can only use normal attacks.
stable: Cannot be knocked into the air, knocked back, or be involuntarily moved.
strongest: Living unit that currently has the highest HP ratio.
suppress: 暂未使用，要用的时候还需要琢磨一下。异常状态的一种，该状态无视免疫控制。被压制的角色无法行动，直至状态解除。
surrounded:
Living unit that is currently the closest to the nearest enemy.
When the distance from the nearest enemy is the same, the more enemies there are within this distance, the closer the enemy will be deemed to be.
takedown: If a hero recently dealt damage to or inflicted a debuff on an enemy that has been defeated, the hero is considered to have assisted in defeating that enemy.
taunt: One of the abnormal states. Taunted units can only attack the caster, and only with normal attacks.
teamatk: The sum of the ATK of all deployed allied units.
teamhp: The sum of the HP of all deployed allied units.
weakest: Living unit that currently has the lowest HP ratio.
